markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review SEO audit findings and align on a content refresh strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=590.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Content Strategy:** A three-tiered plan will address traffic declines: Full Refreshes for major losses, Minor Refreshes for pages just outside the top 10, and Merges for cannibalizing articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Immediate Priority:** The team will pause new content next week to execute a batch of Minor Refreshes, targeting a quick traffic recovery.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [**LLM Traffic Insight:** GA4 data reveals significant LLM referral traffic (e.g., 60% of clicks for one article), suggesting external citations (e.g., partner directories) are now a critical SEO factor.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [**Action Plan:** Jakub will deliver a prioritized refresh punch list by EOD tomorrow; Jesse will review four pending "Coffee Chat" articles.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)

## Topics

### SEO Audit Findings

  - [An audit combining GSC and Ahrefs data identified three content issues causing traffic declines:](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**1. Significant Traffic Loss:** Pages with old publish dates and major keyword/position drops.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
          - [**Action:** Full Refreshes (e.g., "partner page examples").](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**2. Pages Just Outside Top 10:** Articles in positions 2–4 or 11–20.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
          - [**Action:** Minor Refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**3. Keyword Cannibalization:** Multiple articles competing for the same keywords (e.g., "ebook examples" vs. "ebook best practices").](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)
          - [**Action:** Merge into a single, comprehensive article.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1710.0)

### Proposed Refresh Strategy

  - [**Minor Refreshes:** The primary tactic for quick wins.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [**Process:** Reset publish date + add a TLDR/FAQ section.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The new date signals freshness to Google, while new content provides LLM fodder.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Efficiency:** An estimated 8 Minor Refreshes can be done for every 1 Full Refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive a \~15% click increase, based on past client success.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=870.0)
  - [**Prioritization:** The refresh list will be ordered by traffic/keyword volume to maximize impact.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**Content Relevance:** Jesse will flag irrelevant topics (e.g., "SEO internship") to de-prioritize them.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)

### LLM Traffic Analysis

  - [**Finding:** GA4 data shows unusually high LLM referral traffic, with one article receiving 60% of its clicks from LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** External citations (e.g., partner directories) are now a critical SEO factor, as LLMs use them to source information.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Action:** Jakub will analyze LLM traffic trends by content cluster to inform future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1233.0)

### Content Operations

  - [**Pending Articles:** Jesse has four "Coffee Chat" articles to review.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
      - [**Process:** Use the "Content OS" interface (link provided in Slack) to approve/reject.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [**Next Week's Focus:** The team will pause new content to execute the refresh plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jakub:** Deliver a prioritized refresh punch list by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1832.0)
  - [**Jesse:** Review and provide feedback on the four pending "Coffee Chat" articles by EOD tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [**Team:** Pause new content next week to execute the refresh plan.](https://fathom.video/share/Fgtxwsh8UQ7UTMtJe4sug8NpMH6LgJmh?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
